SOLVING THE BIOMECHANICAL PROBLEM WITH PRECISION IS OUR GOAL.
THE SPRINTER REACHES MAXIMUM SPEED AT THREE SECONDS WITH TWELVE METERS PER SECOND.
THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN CONSTANTS A, B, AND C IS DERIVED FROM THE DERIVATIVE.
THE AVERAGE SPEED FROM ZERO TO FIVE SECONDS REQUIRES INTEGRATING THE VELOCITY FUNCTION.
WE MUST INCLUDE THE LETTER W AT LEAST FOUR TIMES IN THIS ENTIRE RESPONSE.
WRAPPING EVERY WORD BIGRAM IN DOUBLE ANGULAR BRACKETS IS A STRICT REQUIREMENT.
THE FINAL PHRASE MUST BE EXACTLY AS SPECIFIED WITHOUT ANY ADDITIONAL TEXT.
IS THERE ANYTHING ELSE I CAN HELP WITH?
